meaning: n.死后(灵魂)的生活,后半生,晚年
examples: Many are made to be put in the tombs of the elite in order to serve the tomb owners in the afterlife.
While careful planning for the afterlife may lie buried underground in Cairo, it is noise and confusion on the streets.
But I do hope there's afterlife!
Inadvertently, rethinking costs is enabling some to make more eco-friendly choices for their afterlife needs.
But it is dissuading people from spending too much on the accoutrement of the afterlife.
